chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 359 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1561/2019 2. For hearing of main case 03.03.2025 Mr. Umer Farooq, advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain advocate for respondent Mr. Fahim Raza Khuhro advocate for respondent along with Mr. Jahanzaib Abbasi, A.D.C. Ms. Zakia advocate holds brief for Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Sardar Zafar Hussain advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. Statement filed on behalf of respondent, taken on record. In view of the foregoing learned counsel for the petitioner states that petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
